task: 更新 GitHub 仓库 LING71671/open-reverselab 并配置 MCP
no_popup_policy: AI may run entries with launch_mode=cli or launch_mode=file_probe. Entries with launch_mode=gui must not be launched during automatic checks; verify them only by file existence/hash unless the user explicitly asks to open the GUI.

matched_rules.when: GitHub release 下载不稳且本地 jadx zip/jar 损坏
matched_rules.method: 若 jadx 再损坏，优先从 SourceForge mirror 下载 v1.5.5 zip，验证 zip/jar 后解压到 tools/android/jadx，并确认 ai_toolcheck android PASS。
matched_rules.evidence: Tool version output and analysis artifacts produced in the current workspace.

suggested_tools.name: jadx CLI
suggested_tools.notes: CLI wrapper uses absolute classpath and does not launch GUI.
